hero.subtitle: AI conversations, cloud storage, and document analysis — all in one platform. Like building civilization on barren land — build intelligent infrastructure on your data.

ai.title: AI-Powered Analytics
ai.description: Uploaded documents are indexed with vector embeddings, enabling RAG-based semantic search that truly understands your file contents. AI reads and analyzes files directly, writes notes, and automatically discovers semantic connections across documents.

cloud.title: Scalable Cloud Architecture
cloud.description: Folder management, drag-and-drop uploads, shareable links, and WebDAV access. Per-user storage quotas and plan-based management make it a cloud infrastructure that scales with your needs. Supports file compression, batch operations, and efficient file workflows.

assistant.title: AI Personal Assistant
assistant.description: Schedule management, email sending, note organization, web search, browser automation, data collection, code execution — your AI assistant autonomously handles complex workflows. Persistent memory retains conversation context, and credentials stored in the secure vault are used seamlessly.
